description: LazyMix+ v4.0 — realistic amateur photography, SD 1.5 checkpoint
_comment_model: SD 1.5 DreamBooth checkpoint by KayLazy, pruned fp16 version by Erquint (~2 GB vs 5 GB original).
_comment_style: Optimised for candid, unposed, amateur-style realistic photography. No trigger word needed.
_comment_steps: 28–35 steps recommended for SD 1.5 realistic checkpoints. Higher than generic SD 1.5 default (30) for added detail.
_comment_cfg: 5.0–7.0. Lower CFG (5–6) produces more natural, less 'overcooked' looking results — typical for photorealistic SD 1.5 models.
_comment_size: SD 1.5 native resolution is 512x512. 512x768 (portrait) and 768x512 (landscape) work well for figures.
_comment_negative: Suggest using a strong negative prompt: 'cartoon, anime, painting, illustration, 3d render, cgi, unrealistic, deformed'
